changes.comment: New package (provisional). B-1 scaffold of the Result-integration boundary over @huggingface/transformers, mirroring the @fgv/ts-extras-webauthn discipline. Empty surface at B-1 (exports a PROVISIONAL_SCAFFOLD sentinel); primitives populated in B-2 of the local-ai-exploration cluster. May be discarded entirely at the B-3 done-or-discard gate if the facade does not earn its keep.
